input.content:
#!/usr/bin/env python3
# -*- coding: utf-8 -*-
"""
清理Word文档中的插图占位符文字，保留图片
"""

from docx import Document
import re

def should_delete_paragraph(text):
    """判断段落是否应该被删除"""
    if not text or not text.strip():
        return False

    # 定义需要删除的关键词模式
    patterns = [
        r'插图占位符',
        r'\[插图占位符',
        r'【插图',
        r'🖼️',
        r'\[插图\s*#',
        r'【插图\s*#',
    ]

    # 检查是否包含任何关键词
    for pattern in patterns:
        if re.search(pattern, text):
            return True

    return False

def clean_document(input_path, output_path):
    """清理文档中的占位符文字"""
    print(f"正在读取文档: {input_path}")
    doc = Document(input_path)

    deleted_count = 0
    total_paragraphs = len(doc.paragraphs)

    # 从后向前遍历，避免删除时索引变化的问题
    paragraphs_to_delete = []

    for i, paragraph in enumerate(doc.paragraphs):
        text = paragraph.text
        if should_delete_paragraph(text):
            paragraphs_to_delete.append((i, text[:50]))  # 记录索引和前50个字符

    print(f"\n找到 {len(paragraphs_to_delete)} 个需要删除的段落（共 {total_paragraphs} 个段落）")

    # 从后向前删除段落
    for i, preview in reversed(paragraphs_to_delete):
        p = doc.paragraphs[i]
        # 获取段落的父元素并删除
        p_element = p._element
        p_element.getparent().remove(p_element)
        deleted_count += 1
        print(f"删除段落 {i+1}: {preview}...")

    print(f"\n成功删除 {deleted_count} 个占位符段落")
    print(f"正在保存到: {output_path}")
    doc.save(output_path)
    print("完成！")

if __name__ == "__main__":
    input_file = r"C:\Users\Administrator\AI科普画册\AI前沿知识儿童科普画册-完整版-已插图.docx"
    output_file = r"C:\Users\Administrator\AI科普画册\AI前沿知识儿童科普画册-清理版.docx"

    clean_document(input_file, output_file)
